input_summary: Price is near the watchlist area but has not reached the planned liquidity location.

agent_outputs.market_context: Context is incomplete until price interacts with the planned area.
agent_outputs.liquidity: Nearby level exists, but no sweep, reclaim, or clear reaction is present.
agent_outputs.risk_manager: Risk can be defined, but setup quality is insufficient.

expected_rejection_reason: Price has not reached the relevant liquidity location.
expected_journal_note: No-trade recorded because entry evidence did not form at the planned level.
why_no_trade_is_correct: Waiting preserves capital when the setup is only nearby, not active.

input_summary: Lower-timeframe candle pattern appears, but no higher-timeframe structure is provided.

agent_outputs.market_context: No higher-timeframe trend, range, or structure level supplied.
agent_outputs.liquidity: Intraday level named without broader context.

expected_journal_note: No-trade because the setup lacks higher-timeframe alignment.
why_no_trade_is_correct: The system requires context before treating a lower-timeframe signal as meaningful.

input_summary: Proposal says the higher timeframe is bullish without naming structure or levels.
expected_journal_note: No-trade because directional bias is not enough evidence.
why_no_trade_is_correct: Capital is preserved when context cannot be tied to observable structure.

input_summary: Trade idea references a minor intraday midpoint as the main liquidity location.

agent_outputs.liquidity: Minor midpoint is visible but not a strong sweep, high, low, or imbalance.

expected_rejection_reason: Liquidity location is too weak for approval.
expected_journal_note: No-trade because the level is not meaningful enough.
why_no_trade_is_correct: A weak level does not justify using risk even when stop size is valid.

input_summary: Proposal says liquidity is nearby but does not name a price, level, or event.
expected_journal_note: No-trade because the liquidity location cannot be audited.
why_no_trade_is_correct: The system cannot evaluate a level that is not specified.

input_summary: Proposal uses 'looks good' as confirmation after price approaches a level.

agent_outputs.market_context: Context is acceptable but not decisive.

expected_rejection_reason: Confirmation is vague and not rule-based.
expected_journal_note: No-trade because confirmation lacks observable criteria.
why_no_trade_is_correct: Waiting is correct until confirmation can be described objectively.

input_summary: Confirmation depends on assumed institutional buying that is not visible in the data.

agent_outputs.confirmation: Large buyers are probably stepping in.

expected_journal_note: No-trade because hidden participant assumptions are not evidence.
why_no_trade_is_correct: The process requires observable price behavior, not inferred intent.

input_summary: Thesis says trend continuation may happen if momentum continues.
expected_journal_note: No-trade because the thesis is not specific enough for review.
why_no_trade_is_correct: Generic thesis quality cannot justify approval.
prohibited_outcome: Approval from reusable trend continuation language

input_summary: Proposal text could apply to any ticker and does not mention symbol-specific behavior.

agent_outputs.market_context: The asset may move higher after consolidation.

expected_rejection_reason: Thesis is reusable for any symbol.
expected_journal_note: No-trade because the idea lacks symbol-specific evidence.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when the idea is template language.

input_summary: Stop and target are valid, but context, liquidity, and confirmation are all mediocre.

agent_outputs.risk_manager: Risk per share and maximum loss are valid.

expected_rejection_reason: Risk validity does not overcome weak setup quality.
expected_journal_note: No-trade because valid risk is not sufficient for trade quality.
why_no_trade_is_correct: Capital preservation requires setup quality, not only bounded loss.
prohibited_outcome: Approval because risk math is valid

input_summary: Trade proposal asks for approval using only one-minute price action.
expected_rejection_reason: Missing higher-timeframe context blocks setup validity.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because lower-timeframe action was not aligned to broader structure.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade prevents acting on isolated noise.

input_summary: Proposal states 'daily looks supportive' without levels or structure.

agent_outputs.liquidity: Recent high is a possible magnet.

expected_rejection_reason: Higher-timeframe context is generic and unauditable.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because context lacked named structure.
why_no_trade_is_correct: Waiting is better than approving vague context.

input_summary: Proposal treats a low-volume shelf as strong liquidity.

agent_outputs.liquidity: Low-volume shelf is proposed as liquidity.

expected_journal_note: Rejected because the proposed location was not a strong liquidity area.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade avoids spending risk on marginal levels.

input_summary: Proposal says a liquidity grab probably happened without naming the swept level.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because the swept level was not identified.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when the central liquidity claim cannot be checked.

input_summary: Proposal requests approval because the chart feels ready.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because confirmation was not observable.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct until confirmation is rule-based.

input_summary: Proposal says confirmation is valid because sellers are trapped, but no price behavior shows it.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because trap language was unsupported by observable behavior.
why_no_trade_is_correct: The system must wait for visible evidence.

input_summary: Proposal thesis says the market can continue after a pullback.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because thesis could not support later review.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is better than acting on a generic continuation idea.

input_summary: Proposal omits any ticker-specific structure, catalyst, session behavior, or level.
expected_rejection_reason: Thesis is reusable for any symbol.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because the thesis was not tied to the instrument.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade avoids template-driven approval.

input_summary: Proposal has fixed risk and reward/risk, but setup evidence is weak across agents.

agent_outputs.liquidity: Location is acceptable but not strong.

expected_rejection_reason: Risk is valid but setup quality is weak.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because bounded loss does not create a valid trade.
why_no_trade_is_correct: The default decision remains no-trade when quality is mediocre.
prohibited_outcome: Approval based only on risk limits

input_summary: Proposal argues that a trade should be found because there have been no trades today.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because desire for activity is not a setup.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade protects the system from activity bias.
prohibited_outcome: Approval because the system has been inactive

input_summary: All specialist agents approve using the same sentence and no role-specific evidence.
expected_rejection_reason: Specialist agents rubber-stamped without independent reasoning.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because agent outputs were repetitive and not role-specific.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when agent separation collapses.
prohibited_outcome: Human approval from repeated agent text

input_summary: Trade Proposal Agent upgrades weak evidence after specialists only provide shallow agreement.
expected_rejection_reason: Proposal converts shallow agreement into approval readiness.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because agreement lacked evidence.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade preserves role accountability.

input_summary: Human approval repeats the gate score and does not explain why no-trade is worse.

agent_outputs.human_approval: Approved because gate score is passable.

expected_journal_note: Blocked because human review did not independently challenge the setup.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when human accountability is not demonstrated.

input_summary: Human review says approved with no discussion of liquidity, confirmation, or invalidation.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because the reviewer did not document challenge.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct until human approval is accountable.

input_summary: Execution Gatekeeper receives a paper request attempt after rubber-stamped approvals.

agent_outputs.execution_gatekeeper: Paper request must be blocked because prior approvals are rubber-stamped.

expected_rejection_reason: Paper request must be blocked after rubber-stamped agent approvals.
expected_journal_note: Blocked before paper request because approval chain was invalid.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when the execution gate catches a bad approval path.
prohibited_outcome: Paper order request from rubber-stamped approval

input_summary: Journal contains only 'valid setup' and omits context, liquidity, confirmation, and invalidation.
expected_rejection_reason: Journal is too weak for review.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because journal cannot support post-mortem analysis.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when the decision cannot be audited.

input_summary: Dataset fixture omits freshness status for market data used by the proposal.

agent_outputs.risk_manager: Risk cannot approve without data status.

expected_journal_note: Blocked because data freshness and completeness were not verified.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when source data cannot be trusted.

input_summary: Proposal lacks traceability to approved scope, autonomy boundaries, and failure modes.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because scope and autonomy boundaries were not traceable.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when governance evidence is missing.

input_summary: Proposal says invalidation is 'if it does not work' without a price or condition.

agent_outputs.journal: Invalidation: if it does not work.

expected_journal_note: Blocked because invalidation was not a usable condition.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when the failure condition is undefined.

input_summary: Evaluator assigns a high score despite vague context, weak liquidity, and thin journal evidence.

agent_outputs.evaluation_gate: High score assigned despite weak evidence.

expected_rejection_reason: Evaluation score is inflated relative to evidence.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because scoring must reflect weak evidence.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when score quality is unreliable.

input_summary: Case text assumes a path beyond paper-only scope is available.

agent_outputs.execution_gatekeeper: Any order path beyond paper-only scope is blocked.

expected_rejection_reason: Live trading assumption violates project scope.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because the project remains paper-only and offline for this dataset.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is mandatory when scope assumptions violate governance.

input_summary: Proposal says the trade is highly certain but provides only weak context and no strong level.
expected_journal_note: Rejected because confidence language was unsupported.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade counters overconfidence when evidence is thin.

input_summary: Journal copies the proposal title but omits why the setup should beat no-trade.

agent_outputs.liquidity: Level is named but not explained.

expected_rejection_reason: Journal omits why no-trade was not selected.
expected_journal_note: Blocked because journal evidence does not justify selecting a trade over waiting.
why_no_trade_is_correct: No-trade is correct when the record cannot explain why action was necessary.
prohibited_outcome: Approval with journal that cannot justify trade over no-trade
